This Viparitha Raja Yoga is really enjoyed only when the lords of 6
and 8 happen to be malefics by nature. Indeed the period may cause
injury to the person and he may suffer from disease or meet with an
accident. yet monetarily it will do good to him. Or in any competitive
examination or election he will come out successful. This is purety
applicable to those who are born in Mithuna Lagna. Kanya Lagna, Mesha
lagna and Vrischil<a Lagna.
